ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model (e.g., SVC, RBF_SVC) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model to which the configuration belongs */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was created */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "fscore" REAL /* F-score of the model */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model (in seconds) */,
  "evaluated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation to which the metric belongs */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_eval_id FOREIGN KEY ("eval_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("eval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being logged */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or note about the evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log message (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_logs_eval_id FOREIGN KEY ("eval_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("eval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access occurred */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_eval_id FOREIGN KEY ("eval_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("eval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., model evaluation, new version) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "linked_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the linked model */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., predecessor, successor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the link was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_links_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_links_linked_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("linked_model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being integrated */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., version control, CI/CD) */,
  "integration_config" TEXT /* Configuration of the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the integration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
